title: Safety education
doc_html:
PART II.  SAFETY WORK

§1341.  Safety education

The department shall advise and instruct the people in Louisiana in accident prevention and in safety consciousness, so that the lives, limbs, and property of our citizens may be safeguarded.
doc_text:
PART II.  SAFETY WORK
§1341.  Safety education
The department shall advise and instruct the people in Louisiana in accident prevention and in safety consciousness, so that the lives, limbs, and property of our citizens may be safeguarded.
